headline: Why Caterpillar (CAT) Is Becoming a Power Infrastructure Play Too
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is one of the best stocks to buy for global infrastructure spending. The company’s latest infrastructure-related catalyst came on April 29, when ProPetro Holding Corp.’s PROPWR unit entered into a strategic framework agreement with Caterpillar to purchase up to 2.1 gigawatts of incremental power-generation assets by 2031. headline: Cummins CEO Explains How to Manage the AI Boom
summary: Cummins  —the dominant maker of diesel engine technology—finds itself, happily, caught up in the AI data-center boom.  CEO Jennifer Rumsey’s company is no stranger to boom-bust business cycles, and she says it can navigate the swings in AI demand.  Cummins’ AI-related business—supplying backup power for data centers—has sent the stock to levels not seen in a decade.

headline: A Manufacturing Boom Is Here: Is The Driver Trump's Tariffs Or AI?
summary: US manufacturing PMI hit a 48-month high in May. But it's AI infrastructure capex, not Trump's tariffs, driving the reshoring boom.
